text_block_list.text:
One day, after the Kikuka Sho, while we're
training for the spring Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

Her usually pinpoint-accurate lap times are out of
sync.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I'm okay... I will proceed to the next exercise after
I have recovered.

Her condition still seems off after that, so I call an
early stop to the day's training.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Error detected. Status—"unsettled."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
This is an intermittent error that has been
occurring since the Kikuka Sho, usually during
memory playback of that race.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Analysis result—cause unknown...
Mihono Bourbon looks almost meek. Just then...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um... Bourbon?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Hello, Flower. How can I help you?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I know this is probably none of my business, but...
um... are you feeling okay?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I am fine. Why do you ask?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's just me, but it seems like you've been a
bit out of it lately.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You also seem to be eating a lot less than usual
recently. It's got me worried.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Consulting data logs. It's true that my average
food intake levels this week have decreased by
twenty percent compared to before.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
However, my body temperature is normal, and I
am in no pain. I am fine. There are no issues.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: That said... "Thank you for your concern."

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
If you say so then that's good, but... please don't
push yourself too hard, okay?
The next day...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
(200 meters completed in 12.33 seconds.
Execute operation—"tempo keep.")

Mihono Bourbon is back to running as usual,
recording mechanically precise times as if her
performance yesterday was just an anomaly.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
(Reoccurrence of "unsettled" feeling deep in my
chest confirmed.)

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I will win today!

1,000 meters before the finish line, Bourbon
abruptly accelerates and finishes with an absurd
lap time.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
... An error has occurred. I fell into a state of
confusion while running. The cause behind the
phenomenon is unknown.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My physical fatigue has reached its limit. This will
not interfere with my training, however.

No matter how you slice it, there seems to be an
issue. I take her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: School Nurse
text_block_list.text:
You don't seem to have any physical
abnormalities. No nutritional or sleep
deficiencies, and you don't seem anemic.

text_block_list.name: School Nurse
text_block_list.text:
It could be something psychological. I think it
would be a good idea to take some time off.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
But it is essential for me to make my daily
adjustments in preparation for the spring Tenno
Sho.
choice_data_list:
I know how you feel, but you need to take a
break.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Order acknowledged.

Thus, we schedule a few days off, beginning
immediately.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The chirping of the birds... The ripples on the
river's surface...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Status—"idle."

Mihono Bourbon stares absentmindedly at the
water's surface. And then...
Thud, thud, thud, thud!

A small shadow runs along the riverbank with
incredible speed.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant... One... more... lap!
Thud!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Rice has fallen. I must provide aid immedi—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hnnng!

Rice Shower leaps straight back to her feet and
starts running again.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
(Old shoes discarded by the roadside discovered.
Based on their shape and color, I conclude they
belonged to Rice.)

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: YAAAAAH!

Mihono Bourbon continues to watch Rice
Shower's solo training for the next few hours.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Are you all right, Rice? It looked as if you hit your
knee when you fell earlier.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Gyah! Bourbon?!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah, I did! It's bleeding a little...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
You should not neglect a wound, even if it is
small. Let's go wash it and apply a bandage.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Treatment complete. Please keep the area moist
and replace the bandage with a fresh one
periodically.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Th-thanks...

Mihono Bourbon puts away her equipment and
looks firmly at Rice Shower's face.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Your actions were unexpected.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
According to my logs, it is not in your nature to
start running again immediately after falling.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh... you saw that? Well, that was...

Rice Shower looks up at Mihono Bourbon as if
she's set her mind on something.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I want to do my best in the spring Tenno Sho...
I-it's all because of you, Bourbon.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Me?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
...My heart has been racing ever since I ran
against you at full speed in the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
When I think about that race, my heart pounds
and I get chills up my spine. I just can't help it...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I want to win... I want to win so much! I've never
wanted something so badly before!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
When I get this feeling, the timid old Rice Shower
starts to shrink back.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I feel that maybe... I can work even harder!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: It might even be possible to get first place at the spring Tenno Sho... No, I want take first place!

Mihono Bourbon gazes intently at Rice Shower as
she speaks.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, something smells good... Could carrot curry
be on the menu today?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
(The "heart pounding" that Rice described is
something that I have a tendency to feel when the
memories of the Kikuka Sho replay in my mind.)

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
(Her declaration suggests that this correlates with
a "desire to win." In other words...)

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Bourbon?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Rice. I will take my leave now.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: There is a matter that I must report to Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I have a "desire to win."

That's the first thing out of Mihono Bourbon's
mouth after she suddenly bursts into my office.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Replaying voice data.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
"I want to win... I want to win so much! I've never
wanted something so badly before!"

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I feel the same way.

She isn't typically one to get excited about
winning, but...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I want to compete against others just like I
competed against Rice at the Kikuka Sho. I
"desire to win."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I want to experience this as many times as I can,
to relive those emotions.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: That is my desire!

When she says that, her eyes sparkle in a way I've
never seen before.

It's like she's a different person compared to when
she was feeling unwell three days ago.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: That's why, I'm going to win the spring Tenno Sho.

Mihono Bourbon gives me a smile filled with
elation and anticipation.
